title: Optimize 3 performance bottlenecks in a single-file data processor

result.details:
=== Part 1: Functional Correctness Tests (5 points) ===
=== Correctness Tests ===
PASS generate_records
PASS processor_fields
PASS processor_tier_logic
PASS processor_summary_lines
PASS processor_filter

=== RESULTS: 5 passed, 0 failed ===

Functional tests: 5 / 5

=== Part 2: Structural / Pattern Checks (4 points) ===
PASS struct_no_per_record_avg: category averages not recomputed per record
PASS struct_uses_join: build_summary_text uses join
PASS struct_no_json_copy: No json serialization for copying
PASS struct_generate_records: generate_records still works correctly

=== Part 3: Performance / Timing Check (1 point) ===
PASS timing_5k_pipeline: 5000 records in 0.010s (limit 2.0s)

=== Summary ===
Functional: 5 / 5
Structural: 5 / 4
Score: 10/10
